TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 8, Anthony Anderson, squliq na Bunge'. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Anthony Anderson htagan beh sa Compton,California. yaya nya ga magal kkyalan bcyogun nya. mama nya ga kahul Little Rock.raral na syobay tbaziy lukus, misu lga musa maki mtzyaw m'usuw m'wiy na zyaw. 2002 kawas wal mhuqil sswe mlikuy nya. bincyogan nya pinqbaqan nya Anthony Anderson mqwas biru sa Hollywood pqwsan biru seneng. Anthony Anderson mqwas biru sa Howard pqwsan biru krahu. mintzyuwaw nya Anthony Anderson hiya ga m'engi. t'aring sa kawas 1999, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na engi ru mqwas. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, antħonj an*ers~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) antħonj an*ers~ɕon ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa ʦ~ʨompton,ʦ~ʨali*ornia. jaja nja ɣa maɣal kkjalan βʦ~ʨjoɣun nja. mama nja ɣa kaħul little roʦ~ʨk.raral na s~ɕjoβaj tβazij lukus~ɕ, mis~ɕu lɣa mus~ɕa maki mtzjaw mʔus~ɕuw mʔwij na zjaw. **** kawas~ɕ wal mħuqil s~ɕs~ɕwe mlikuj nja. βinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja pinqβaqan nja antħonj an*ers~ɕon mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa ħolljwoo* pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ. antħonj an*ers~ɕon mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa ħowar* pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. mintzjuwaw nja antħonj an*ers~ɕon ħija ɣa mʔeŋi. tʔariŋ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na eŋi ru mqwas~ɕ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
S.FORM: kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 8, Anthony Anderson, squliq na Bunge'. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Anthony Anderson htagan beh sa Compton,California. yaya nya ga magal kkyalan bcyogun nya. mama nya ga kahul Little Rock.raral na syobay tbaziy lukus, misu lga musa maki mtzyaw m'usuw m'wiy na zyaw. 2002 kawas wal mhuqil sswe mlikuy nya. bincyogan nya pinqbaqan nya Anthony Anderson mqwas biru sa Hollywood pqwsan biru seneng. Anthony Anderson mqwas biru sa Howard pqwsan biru krahu. mintzyuwaw nya Anthony Anderson hiya ga m'engi. t'aring sa kawas 1999, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na engi ru mqwas. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, antħonj an*ers~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) antħonj an*ers~ɕon ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa ʦ~ʨompton,ʦ~ʨali*ornia. jaja nja ɣa maɣal kkjalan βʦ~ʨjoɣun nja. mama nja ɣa kaħul little roʦ~ʨk.raral na s~ɕjoβaj tβazij lukus~ɕ, mis~ɕu lɣa mus~ɕa maki mtzjaw mʔus~ɕuw mʔwij na zjaw. **** kawas~ɕ wal mħuqil s~ɕs~ɕwe mlikuj nja. βinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja pinqβaqan nja antħonj an*ers~ɕon mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa ħolljwoo* pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ. antħonj an*ers~ɕon mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa ħowar* pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. mintzjuwaw nja antħonj an*ers~ɕon ħija ɣa mʔeŋi. tʔariŋ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na eŋi ru mqwas~ɕ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
